text:
There was once a little girl named Lily. She loved cookies most of all. Her grandma always made gingerbread cookies, but Lily didn't think they were scary. She'd eat one and say how delicious. Once she found a cookie with pink icing. She looked at it weird. Then her grandma slapped her. She stopped eating the pink ones. She liked cookies but didn't love them that much.

One day Lily went camping. Every year. She didn't know what would happen. She climbed trees better when she slept upside down. It was scary but fun. One night they saw stars they'd never seen. Lily closed her eyes tight. She liked dreams.

There was a thunderstorm. Thunder cracked everywhere. Lightning struck trees. She didn't feel scared. She jumped. She giggled. Everything sounded weird. Moonbeams?

She woke up happy. That’s all.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
